productDisplayName: Nike Men Arsenal Ss Tr Red Jersey
description: Composition Red crew neck Arsenal training jersey made of 100% polyester, with Authentic jock tag at left hem, swoosh trademark at right chest and Arsenal Club badge on left chest, and engineered with Dri-Fit technology Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Lightweight and breathable, this Arsenal Official home/Away Jersey is designed with the environment in mind. Its sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric was made from the equivalent of eight recycled plastic bottles. Dri-FIT helps keep you dry and comfortable by wicking sweat away from the skin to the fabric's surface, where it quickly evaporates. Dri-FIT mesh panels down the sides enhance ventilation in high-heat areas. The Arsenal Training Soccer Jersey pays tribute to the “Great Innovator's” influence with the traditional red body and white sleeves that have come to define the team. Distinctive design details and breathability offer comfort on and off the field.
